docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-25-2025 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-28-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
